  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="wingGrad" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#CFF7FF" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#A6E8FF" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bodyGrad" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2E8B57" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1E6B4A" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="softShadow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="b" />

  </defs>

  <!-- subtle ground shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="360" rx="110" ry="18" fill="#000" fill-opacity="0.12" />

  <!-- dragonfly group centered -->
  <g transform="translate(256,240) rotate(-15)">
    <!-- Wings (right side, left side mirrored) -->
    <g stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <!-- top right wing -->
      <path d="M12,-12 C140,-150 320,-120 240,-20 C180,-10 80,-2 12,0 Z" fill="url(#wingGrad)" fill-opacity="0.75" />
      <!-- bottom right wing -->

      </g>

      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="20" ry="16" fill="url(#bodyGrad)" stroke="#123" stroke-opacity="0.12" stroke-width="1" />

      <!-- head -->
      <g transform="translate(-42,0)">

        <ellipse cx="8" cy="-4" rx="2" ry="3" fill="#6FEAD1" fill-opacity="0.5" />

        <path d="M-8,-14 C-18,-28 -32,-36 -36,-44" stroke="#19433a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" />

      </g>

      <!-- abdomen segments -->
      <g stroke="#0f4033" stroke-opacity="0.1">
        <ellipse cx="28" cy="0" rx="18" ry="12" fill="#2AA678" />
        <ellipse cx="62" cy="0" rx="16" ry="10" fill="#29A36B" />
        <ellipse cx="94" cy="0" rx="14" ry="9" fill="#23895F" />

        <path d="M44,-8 L44,8" stroke="#0b2f24" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.12" />

        <path d="M156,-5 L156,5" stroke="#0b2f24" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.12" />
      </g>
